message:
update: regenerate Cargo.lock with asupersync 0.2.9 and dependency updates; minor io and conformance fixes

- Regenerate Cargo.lock picking up asupersync 0.2.9 (adds futures-lite,
  crossbeam-deque, js-sys, wasm-bindgen, web-sys, signal-hook 0.3),
  clap 4.6.0, arc-swap 1.9.0, anstyle 1.0.14, and other transitive
  dependency updates
- Fix raptorq_artifacts.rs import or minor adjustment
- Update fnp-io with minor formatting/logic fixes
- Update CI gate topology script with additional steps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
